channel.title: NPR Programs: Morning Edition
channel.description: Morning Edition takes listeners around the country and the world with multi-faceted stories and commentaries every weekday. Hosts Steve Inskeep, Leila Fadel, Michel Martin and A Martínez bring you the latest breaking news and features to prepare you for the day.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: A look at Trump's goals for his summit in China
item.description: NPR's Steve Inskeep asks John Moolenaar, chairman of the House Select Committee on China, about President Trump's goals for his summit in Beijing.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Steve Inskeep asks John Moolenaar, chairman of the House Select Committee on China, about President Trump's goals for his summit in Beijing.
item.dc:creator: Steve Inskeep

item.title: Trump expected to talk Iran and trade during summit in China
item.description: President Trump arrives in China Wednesday for a summit with his Chinese counterpart, where the war in Iran, trade policies and Taiwan are expected to be major points of discussion.
item.content:encoded: President Trump arrives in China Wednesday for a summit with his Chinese counterpart, where the war in Iran, trade policies and Taiwan are expected to be major points of discussion.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Pak

item.title: Chinese economist talks about the competing interest of China and the U.S.
item.description: NPR's Steve Inskeep asks Chinese economist Dan Wang offers about the competing economic interests of China and the U.S.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Steve Inskeep asks Chinese economist Dan Wang offers about the competing economic interests of China and the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Steve Inskeep

item.title: Federal government files criminal charges in deadly Key Bridge collapse
item.description: The federal government has filed charges against the companies involved in the deadly 2024 cargo ship crash at Baltimore's Francis Scott Key Bridge.
item.content:encoded: The federal government has filed charges against the companies involved in the deadly 2024 cargo ship crash at Baltimore's Francis Scott Key Bridge.
item.dc:creator: Scott Maucione

item.title: Tennessee residents grapple with the aftermath of the state's new congressional map
item.dc:creator: Stephen Fowler

item.title: FDA Commissioner Marty Makary resigns after tumultuous tenure
item.description: After a tumultuous 13 months at the helm of the U.S. Food and Drug Administration, Marty Makary has resigned.
item.content:encoded: After a tumultuous 13 months at the helm of the U.S. Food and Drug Administration, Marty Makary has resigned.
item.dc:creator: Sydney Lupkin

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: President Trump arrives in China Wednesday, Pete Hegseth faces questions on the Hill about the rising cost of the Iran war, FDA Commissioner Marty Makary resigns.
item.content:encoded: President Trump arrives in China Wednesday, Pete Hegseth faces questions on the Hill about the rising cost of the Iran war, FDA Commissioner Marty Makary resigns.
item.dc:creator: Michel Martin

item.title: OpenAI's Sam Altman takes the stand to defend company in case brought by Elon Musk
item.description: NPR's Leila Fadel asks New York Times tech correspondent Mike Isaac about Sam Altman's testimony in the lawsuit brought by billionaire entrepreneur Elon Musk against OpenAI.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Leila Fadel asks New York Times tech correspondent Mike Isaac about Sam Altman's testimony in the lawsuit brought by billionaire entrepreneur Elon Musk against OpenAI.
item.dc:creator: Leila Fadel

item.title: Californians feel the pinch of rising gas prices
item.description: California has long had some of the country's highest gas prices. Those numbers have climbed even higher with the Iran war, and people say they're feeling the financial burden.
item.content:encoded: California has long had some of the country's highest gas prices. Those numbers have climbed even higher with the Iran war, and people say they're feeling the financial burden.
item.dc:creator: Azul Dahlstrom-Eckman

item.title: Former FDA Commissioner Scott Gottlieb on the resignation of Marty Makary
item.description: How will the resignation of FDA Commissioner Marty Makary affect the Trump administration's health agenda? Former FDA Commissioner Scott Gottlieb weighs in.
item.content:encoded: How will the resignation of FDA Commissioner Marty Makary affect the Trump administration's health agenda? Former FDA Commissioner Scott Gottlieb weighs in.
item.dc:creator: Leila Fadel
